unicorn-cake-for-birthday-pequerecetas.name: Unicorn Cake For Birthday

ingredients.item: 300 g de mantequilla a temperatura ambiente
500 g de mantequilla sin sal (a temperatura ambiente)
Colorantes en gel: rosa, lila, azul, amarillo (o los que quieras usar)
1 horn and 2 ears of Fondant unicorn or bought already made (you can buy them here)
A black color with an eye-edible pastry gel or pencil
Boquillas rizadas y mangas pasteleras desechables

instructions: We purify the oven at 170 ° C with heat up and down. We have been pounding butter with sugar till it's creamy. We add our eggs one at a time, beating them up every time. We integrate the vanilla and then the steamed flour with the yeast, alternating with milk.

We share the dough with 3 mods of 15 cm (or with baking paper) and bake about 25-30 minutes. We hit with a stick: if it's clear, they're ready. We let them cool completely and then we cut every biscuit into two layers, to get 6 in total.
To make Buttercream, we beat butter for 5-7 minutes till it's very spongy. We put up with the sugar and we're still beating. We integrate milk and vanilla until soft but firm texture.
We divide the buttercream into several ponds and dyed with the colors we have chosen. We have an undyed portion to cover the cake.
We put first layer of biscuit onto the base or plate. With his pastry sleeve we put a good cape of Buttercream. To be easier we first draw the contour and then complete them.
Vamos montando las capas con una capa de buttercream blanca entre cada una. Refrigeramos 20 minutos.
Damos una capa fina de buttercream blanca por fuera (para atrapar las migas) y enfriamos de nuevo.
Then we cover with a second thicker cape and smooth well with spatula.
Usamos las mangas con buttercream de colores y boquillas rizadas para hacer los rizos de la melena en la parte superior y uno de los laterales.
We draw our eyes with an edible pencil or with a paddle wet with a black dyes.
Colocamos el cuerno y las orejas en la parte superior. Refrigeramos hasta el momento de servir.
